title: Implement assignment evidence upload UI on detail screen
description: Wire manager assignment detail UI to assignment evidence endpoints so managers can attach photos/documents, review uploaded evidence metadata, and recover cleanly from unsupported files or upload failures.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment detail exposes an evidence section with upload CTA and deterministic empty/loading/populated states
Successful uploads refresh the evidence list without breaking current assignment actions or navigation context
Unsupported file types, upload failures, forbidden, and unauthorized states remain explicit in the UI
